items.title: Doug Jones, Tommy Tuberville win gubernatorial nominations, setting up 2020 rematch
items.description: U.S. Sen. Tommy Tuberville and former U.S. Sen. Doug Jones won the Republican and Democratic nominations for governor on May 19, 2026, setting up a rematch of their Senate battle in 2020. The candidates' victory parties ...

items.title: Judge dismisses lawsuit challenging Tommy Tuberville’s eligibility to be governor

items.title: US Senate votes to advance resolution limiting Trump war in Iran as Cassidy flips
